page: Microsoft Azure NV6ads_A10_v5 is a virtual machine instance within the NVADSA10v5 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features an x86_64 AMD processor with 6 dedicated vCPUs and 55.0 GB of system memory, yielding approximately 9.17 GB of RAM per core.

This instance includes a fractional NVIDIA A10 GPU, representing approximately 0.1667 of a physical GPU, with 4 GB of dedicated VRAM. Local storage is provided via a 184 GB disk, and the instance is capable of utilizing Premium Storage. It does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

The fractional GPU allocation offers a cost-efficient entry point for workloads requiring GPU acceleration without the expense of a full dedicated GPU. However, the partitioned GPU and 4 GB VRAM limit its suitability for massive parallel training tasks. This configuration is optimized for entry-level GPU-accelerated workloads, virtual desktops, lightweight 3D rendering, and inference tasks that benefit from moderate memory capacity and local storage.
description: Microsoft Azure NV6ads_A10_v5 is an x86_64 virtual machine instance powered by an AMD processor and managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It is configured with 6 dedicated vCPUs, 55.0 GB of system memory, and a 184 GB local disk with Premium Storage capability. For hardware acceleration, the instance includes a fractional NVIDIA A10 GPU (0.1667 of a full GPU) with 4 GB of VRAM. This resource distribution provides a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 9.17 GB per core alongside entry-level graphics capabilities. The qualitative cost profile of this instance makes it a resource-dense option for workloads that require GPU acceleration but do not demand a full physical GPU. It is suited for virtual desktop infrastructure, light 3D visualization, and moderate database or inference workloads.
og_description: Microsoft Azure NV6ads_A10_v5 is an x86_64 virtual machine featuring 6 dedicated AMD vCPUs, 55 GB of RAM, a 184 GB local disk, and a fractional NVIDIA A10 GPU with 4 GB of VRAM.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure NV6ads_A10_v5 is an x86_64 VM with 6 AMD vCPUs, 55 GB RAM, 184 GB local storage, and a fractional NVIDIA A10 GPU.
tagline: An AMD-powered virtual machine featuring a fractional graphics accelerator, high memory capacity, and local storage for entry-level GPU workloads.
bullet_points: 6 dedicated AMD vCPUs on x86_64 architecture
Fractional NVIDIA A10 GPU with 4 GB VRAM
55.0 GB system memory (9.17 GB per vCPU)
184 GB local disk with Premium Storage capability
Optimized for virtual desktops and light GPU-accelerated workloads
